title: Trump warns of ‘big tariff’ if UK doesn’t drop digital services tax on U.S. tech firms
summary_full: The tax is a 2% levy on the revenues of search engines, social media services and online marketplaces that derive value from U.K. users.
summary_public: The tax is a 2% levy on the revenues of search engines, social media services and online marketplaces that derive value from U.K. users.

GB.label: negative
GB.evidence: Trump warns of ‘big tariff’ if UK doesn’t drop digital services tax
